name: tomorrow
html:
```svg
<svg width="300" height="300" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="#ffffff" />
  
  <circle cx="150" cy="150" r="80" fill="#ccc8b5" />
  <ellipse cx="130" cy="130" rx="20" ry="30" fill="#ffffff" />
  <ellipse cx="170" cy="130" rx="20" ry="30" fill="#ffffff" />
  <circle cx="140" cy="140" r="5" fill="#620013" />
  <circle cx="160" cy="140" r="5" fill="#620013" />
  <ellipse cx="150" cy="160" rx="15" ry="10" fill="#ec4a53" />
  
  <path d="M90,150 C90,120 120,100 150,100 C180,100 210,120 210,150" fill="none" stroke="#620013" stroke-width="3" />
  
  <ellipse cx="120" cy="190" rx="15" ry="8" fill="#4598aa" />
  <ellipse cx="180" cy="190" rx="15" ry="8" fill="#4598aa" />
  
  <text x="150" y="270" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="30" fill="#4f96da" text-anchor="middle">
    tomorrow
  </text>
</svg>
```
instruction: create a svg logo with a chubby rabbit resembling Hayao Miyazaki's style using the nature color with professional typography saying tomorrow
